discussion: On this benchmark, ReAct achieved 79.0% EM (79/100 correct) with 1 attempt per question, while Reflexion reached 100.0% EM at 1.41 average attempts. Reflexion improved EM by +21.00 percentage points but used +43,570 more tokens and 28.3s extra runtime versus ReAct. ReAct failure modes: {'incomplete_multi_hop': 21}. Reflexion failure modes: {'none': 100}. Estimated combined cost at $0.1500/1M tokens: $0.0205 ($0.000102/record). Reflection memory was most useful when the first attempt stopped early or picked a wrong entity; the main tradeoff is higher latency and token usage per question.
